overall.description: A completely static first-person view of a dimly lit rustic bedroom interior from a video game. The scene features wooden architecture, a burning candle on a table in the foreground, and blue moonlight filtering through windows, creating an atmospheric horror or survival game ambiance. No movement or changes occur throughout the clip.

agents.ego_description: standing completely still in the room, observing the dimly lit surroundings

rough stone masonry wall with weathered texture
thick vertical wooden beam supporting the ceiling
two side-by-side windows with multiple panes showing dark blue night sky
rectangular framed artwork hanging on the wall above the bed
exposed horizontal wooden beams across the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in a first-person perspective inside a rustic bedroom. A lit candle on a wooden table in the right foreground provides the primary warm illumination, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight filtering through double windows on the left. The room features stone walls, wooden architectural elements including support beams and ceiling rafters, and a simple bed against the far wall. No movement or changes occur throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static first-person perspective within a dimly lit rustic bedroom, preserving a constant atmosphere of stillness. It begins with a view of a lit candle on a wooden table in the right foreground, which casts a warm glow against the cool blue moonlight filtering through double windows on the left. As the gaze lingers, the composition emphasizes the contrast between the flickering light and the deep shadows clinging to the stone walls and wooden ceiling rafters. The scene remains frozen in this state, holding the steady gaze across the room toward a simple bed against the far wall without any shift in movement or lighting.
